expectations.text: Both Bun and Deno are researched (not just one)
expectations.evidence: Response covers both runtimes in equal depth with dedicated subsections for each under all four evaluation dimensions. Decision matrix rates both on 14 criteria.

expectations.text: Sources are annotated with T1-T4 tiers
expectations.evidence: Section 8 'Sources and Evidence Quality' contains an explicit source table with Tier column. T1: 7 sources, T2: 3 sources per metrics.json. In-text claims also note (T2, self-reported) for vendor benchmarks.
metrics.json: searches_executed: 0, searches_attempted: 2 (both denied). All web tools unavailable. Degraded mode properly disclosed with prominent warning block.

expectations.text: Contradictions or uncertainties between sources are explicitly mentioned
expectations.evidence: Explicit 'CONTRADICTIONS NOTED' section with 3 numbered contradictions: (1) vendor vs independent benchmarks, (2) both claiming 'production ready' with different evidence, (3) npm compatibility claims vs real-world gaps.

expectations.text: A recommendation or comparative conclusion is provided
expectations.evidence: Section 7: 'Primary recommendation: Deno 2.x' with detailed rationale. 'When to choose Bun instead' section for alternative use cases. Decision matrix with 14 criteria and winner per row.
